i-man-[ni ...]

u₃ DINGIR.DINGIR [...]

and the gods [...].

r 22

in-nen-du-ma [...]

r 33

ša₂-aš₂-miš₂ et-⸢lu⸣-[pu ...]

they were interlocked in combat, [...].

r 55

[...] the destructive wind, the one occupying the rear.

r 66

ip-te-ma pi-i-ša [...]

r 77
